case_title: ALVAREZ, GUSTAVO ADOLFO vs. CHICAS, NELSON IND/DB GHO JANITORIAL SERVICES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, GUSTAVO ADOLFO AS TO DEFENDANT CHICAS, NELSON IND/DB GHO JANITORIAL SERVICES
